## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] Validator scripts pass (`python3 -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Config files validated (`python3 scripts/validate-*.py`)
- [ ] No secrets or tokens committed
- [ ] `[skip ci]` used on any auto-generated commits where appropriate
